title: Nia's Colorful Feelings
synopsis: Little Nia discovers different emotions through beautiful colors as she experiences anger, sadness, and happiness throughout her day.

pages.text: Nia feels angry. Red swirls all around!

illustration.description: A little girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes surrounded by angry red swirls and jagged shapes representing frustration and anger
illustration.alt: Nia surrounded by red angry swirls

pages.text: Now Nia feels sad. Blue raindrops fall down.

illustration.description: A little girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes with blue rain falling around her and sad blue clouds in the background
illustration.alt: Nia with blue rain representing sadness

pages.text: Nia feels happy! Yellow sunshine everywhere!

illustration.description: A little girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes smiling brightly surrounded by golden yellow sunshine rays and warm light
illustration.alt: Happy Nia surrounded by yellow sunshine

pages.text: Red, blue, yellow. All feelings are okay!

illustration.description: A little girl with long braids with colorful beads, dark brown skin, warm kind eyes standing confidently with swirls of red, blue, and yellow colors blending harmoniously around her
illustration.alt: Nia with all emotion colors together

metadata.illustrationStyle: emotion mapped colors, angry red swirls, sad blue rain, happy yellow sunshine, abstract emotion backgrounds, Inside Out inspired, feeling visualization, color psychology

questions.question: What color shows Nia's anger?
questions.explanation: Red swirls show when Nia feels angry!

questions.question: What falls when Nia is sad?
questions.explanation: Blue raindrops fall when Nia feels sad!

questions.question: What color makes Nia happy?
questions.explanation: Yellow sunshine makes Nia feel happy!
